sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_quantiles (value Float64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY value;
SELECT quantiles(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)(value) AS quantile_values FROM test_quantiles;
UPDATE test_quantiles SET value = value * 2 WHERE value < 20;
SELECT quantiles(0.1, 0.9)(value) FROM test_quantiles WHERE value > 15;
